#   - Buckets detected: notes (1 file), root (0 files)
#   - Buckets succeeded: 1 of 1
#   - Files read total:    1
#   - Files skipped total: 0
#   - Candidates merged:   (some small number, 2-4)
#   - Candidates verified: 0 (fails cross-domain: only 1 file, 1 bucket)
#   - Rejected reasons:    all cross-domain
#
# Pipeline status: "no_verified_patterns"
# Caller should STOP with the "too thin" message.

# copy the real pipeline output into this file (replacing this comment block)
# and commit. That becomes the golden expected coverage for this fixture.
